zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Montlhéry於1040年出生在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特爾賀利時，她的父親Guy de Montlhéry I31歲，母親Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte36歲。她於1065年之後與Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1113年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼享年73歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪奧易。

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Montlhéry was born in 1040, in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France, her father, Guy de Montlhéry I, was 31 and her mother, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, was 36. She married Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay after 1065. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1113, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 73, and was buried in Oise, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Montlhéry est née en 1040, à Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France, son père, Guy de Montlhéry I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay après 1065. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1113, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Oise, Picardie, France.

de.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Montlhéry 1040 in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Montlhéry I 31 und ihre Mutter Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte 36. Sie hat nach 1065 Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1113 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Oise, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay dopo il 1065. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1113, nel Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Oise, Picardie, Francia.

ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Montlhéry(이)가 1040년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽he리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Montlhéry I(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1065년 이후 Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1113년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 이스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay após 1065. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Montlhéry родилась в 1040 г. в местности монтлхeри, сине-ет-оис, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Montlhéry I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay после 1065 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1113 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности оис, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Montlhéry nació en 1040, en Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, su papá, Guy de Montlhéry I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Hodierna de Gometz-La-Ferte, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay después de 1065. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1113, en Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Oise, Picardie, Francia.
